economic_mechanism: Gradual information diffusion and investor underreaction may cause equities with the strongest prior completed 12-minus-1-month returns to outperform same-date weakest-momentum controls over the next 21 sessions; a future bullish defined-risk PCS was conditional on train-only underlying selector evidence.
candidate_or_family_scope: CROSS_SECTION_12_1_MOMENTUM_PCS_21D_V1 / MONTHLY_CROSS_SECTION_12_1_MOMENTUM_FORWARD_DRIFT: fixed present-day 14-name panel; month-end 252-session momentum ranks skipping the latest 21 sessions; top-three versus bottom-three disjoint same-date controls; next-session entry; non-overlapping 21-session outcomes; chronological first 60% train only; labeled 20-bps underlying round-trip sensitivity; one-sided 90% circular-block-bootstrap lower bound; final 40% unread; structural future one-lot $1-wide PCS context only with capital_fit_usd=100, max_loss_usd=100, max_lots=1.
falsifier: Close the exact frozen family before holdout or option pricing if fewer than 24 train episodes exist, adjusted top-momentum mean is non-positive, paired top-minus-bottom mean is non-positive, the one-sided 90% circular-block-bootstrap lower bound is non-positive, chronology/integrity fails, holdout metrics are read, or option pricing runs. Quarantine unchanged 252/21/top-three/21-session fixed-panel reruns after close.

strategy_advancement.summary: Train n=40 had positive absolute top drift and positive paired point excess, but the predeclared dependence-aware LB90 was -0.013561302557; the uncertainty gate failed, so the family remained F0 and the 27-blueprint holdout and option stage stayed unread/unrun.

search_information.summary: The wake closes one materially different F0 monthly cross-sectional momentum mechanism while adding a reusable train-only chronology/control/bootstrap harness. The negative uncertainty-bound result is information about this frozen selector on this fixed panel, not general market evidence and not permission to invert or retune the inspected control. The third consecutive active-epoch no-advance close triggers burst-stop reassessment.

useful_deltas.summary: Closed the exact monthly 12-minus-1 top-three momentum family at F0 after its favorable paired point estimate failed the frozen dependence-aware lower-bound gate; holdout and option pricing remained untouched.

Added a reusable train-only monthly 12-minus-1 cross-sectional harness and proved the real failure boundary where absolute and paired point means are positive but the bootstrap lower bound is non-positive.

Recorded active-epoch consecutive no-advance close three, superseded the prior pivot with strategy_burst_stop_required=true, and made search-design/data reassessment the unconditional single NEXT.

critic_findings.finding: The focused suite lacked the real failure-mode control where top drift and paired point excess are both positive but the dependence-aware lower bound is non-positive.
critic_findings.rationale: The new fixture holds both point checks positive while forcing LB90 non-positive and asserts the isolated lower-bound gate and aggregate gate fail closed.

critic_findings.finding: A positive paired train point estimate could justify advancement despite the negative predeclared bootstrap lower bound.
critic_findings.rationale: The frozen uncertainty gate is authoritative. FAMILY_CLOSED F0-to-F0 is preserved across the canonical payload, final reports, readiness, and this handoff.

critic_findings.rationale: The finalizer independently reran focused momentum 6/6, shared harness 13/13, compile, exact experiment and reproduction, coverage, platform smoke, and the full 282-test suite.

critic_findings.finding: The fixed present-day 14-name panel result can be generalized or immediately retuned/inverted after inspecting the outcome.
critic_findings.rationale: The evidence remains explicitly survivorship/listing-biased and non-generalizing; exact nearby knobs are quarantined, the holdout is unread, and any inverted thesis requires a new predeclared mechanism after burst-stop reassessment.

critic_findings.finding: The shared low-HV panel/bootstrap helper reuse introduced an unresolved implementation drift.
critic_findings.rationale: No drift was found: direct-script import behavior, focused momentum tests, and the combined 13-test shared-harness regression all passed; shared machinery remains single-source rather than duplicated.

critic_findings.rationale: Living readiness and final wake surfaces now unconditionally stop strategy-search volume and require SEARCH_BURST_STOP_REASSESS_2026-07-14 before any new epoch.
